prompt: make compile
pass_criteria: ./builder exists and is executable; build command exits 0

prompt: ./builder 2>&1 ; echo EXIT=$? ; ./builder bogus 2>&1 ; echo EXIT=$?
pass_criteria: ./builder with no arg prints '? Usage' and exits non-zero; ./builder bogus prints '? Usage' and exits non-zero

prompt: Navigate to /blogs/ and report (a) the count of .blog-item elements; (b) whether the page renders any card titles by extracting the textContent of any h3.blog-title; (c) whether the search input is present.
pass_criteria: 26 blog-item cards rendered; at least one title visible; search input is present and visible.

prompt: Visit /about/ and /blogs/i-added-a-brain-to-my-fridge-it-backfired-hard-1-3 and confirm both embed the shared nav links ([home] [blogs] [about]) and the skip-to-content link.
pass_criteria: Both pages contain nav links and skip link; blog post has giscus script src.

prompt: make build >/dev/null && find public -name '*.html' | wc -l
pass_criteria: find returns >20 HTML files (one per .md source)

prompt: test -s public/assets/style.css && echo CSS_SHIPPED ; wc -c public/assets/style.css
pass_criteria: public/assets/style.css exists and is non-empty (>10 KB); /assets/style.css route returns 200

prompt: grep -rln 'innerHTML\|addEventListener\|matchMedia\|classList' public/ --include='*.js' 2>/dev/null | head -5 ; head -c 200 public/assets/style.css | head -1
pass_criteria: Inline <script> blocks in HTML still contain literal 'function' and 'addEventListener' substrings (no newline flattening); style.css is single-line but invalidates preserved by the prior line.

prompt: curl /feed.xml and report the number of <item> elements and whether <channel> contains <title>, <link>, <description>, <language>, <lastBuildDate>, <ttl>.
pass_criteria: Exactly 26 <item> elements; all 6 channel meta fields present; newest first.

prompt: grep -c '<title>sanix |' public/blogs/asymetric-encryption-of-your-clipboard.html ; grep -c 'twitter:card' public/blogs/asymetric-encryption-of-your-clipboard.html ; grep -c 'og:image' public/blogs/asymetric-encryption-of-your-clipboard.html
pass_criteria: <title> per blog post; og:image + twitter:card meta tags present.

prompt: grep -E '#\w+' public/blogs.html | head -3 ; echo --- ; grep -c '' public/blogs.html ; grep -c '' public/blogs.html
pass_criteria: Multiple tag pills (#xxx) emitted; tags now stored in entry.tags.

prompt: ls public/ ; ls public/blogs/ | head -5
pass_criteria: public/ has subdirs (blogs, projects, components, assets).

prompt: Manual: delete ./content/components/header.md then ./builder build → should exit non-zero.
pass_criteria: exit 1 on missing template (current strict behavior).

prompt: make build 2>&1 | tail -3 ; git status ./content/ | head -3
pass_criteria: Build exits 0; git status shows content/ unchanged (Makefile's git restore restores it).

prompt: Visit / and report whether the H1 says HI and contains a typing class; also confirm the dark terminal-style color scheme.
pass_criteria: H1 with class 'typing' containing 'HI' or similar exists; body background is dark.

prompt: Visit / and locate the #terminalInput. Type 'bogus-cmd' then press Enter once. Report what the output div contains.
pass_criteria: Output shows exactly one 'command not found: bogus-cmd' line (no duplication).

prompt: Visit / and type 'help' then Enter, then 'clear' then Enter. Report the visibility of items in #terminalOutput after clear.
pass_criteria: After clear, the output contains only fresh prompt echo (or empty).

prompt: Flaky: live GitHub API rate-limit from CI
pass_criteria: TC markers present + graceful failure text on error

prompt: Flaky: WakaTime README parse
pass_criteria: TC markers present + graceful failure text on error

prompt: Visit /, in #terminalInput type 'HELP' (uppercase) then Enter. Report what the user echoed line contains.
pass_criteria: Echoed text reads 'help' (lowercase), not 'HELP'. Then 'command not found' line follows.

prompt: Visit / and confirm the nav contains [home] [blogs] [about] in that order, prefixed by code-block backets.
pass_criteria: Three nav links keyed to /, /blogs/, /about visible.

prompt: Visit /blogs/ and report (a) how many .blog-item cards render; (b) the post titles' first 3.
pass_criteria: 26 cards render. First title visible.

prompt: Visit /blogs/. Locate the #search-input. Type 'go' into it (use page.keyboard.type). After 1s, report the textContent of #search-count and the number of .blog-item.is-hidden cards. Then clear by pressing Escape and confirm the count returns to 26 posts.
pass_criteria: After typing 'go', search-count includes 'match' and is-hidden count > 0. After ESC, search-count reads '26 posts' and is-hidden count = 0.

prompt: Visit /about and confirm a static page with the title pointer and any links back to /.
pass_criteria: /about returns 200 and contains forward links to the home and to the article pointer.

prompt: Visit /projects and report whether the page exists and what its primary content section reads.
pass_criteria: /projects returns 200; the page lists projects (raw markdown acceptable today per F-11 spec).

prompt: Visit /blogs/how-i-made-ci-cd-run-locally-in-go and locate #toc-container. Then wait 500ms (hljs runs first). Report whether the #toc-container contains an <ul> with at least one <li>.
pass_criteria: TOC populated with a nested <ul> pointing at heading anchors.

prompt: Visit /blogs/how-to-add-prompt-confirm-box-in-bash and confirm at least one <pre><code> block has class attribute starting with 'hljs' or contains token classes like 'hljs-keyword'.
pass_criteria: Code blocks highlighted with hljs- token class on spans.

prompt: Visit /blogs/i-added-a-brain-to-my-fridge-it-backfired-hard-1-3 and report whether a giscus iframe is loaded with src containing 'giscus.app'.
pass_criteria: giscus.app iframe present after network idle.

prompt: Visit /blogs/how-i-fixed-git-reflog and report whether <meta property="og:image"> and <meta name="twitter:card"> exist with non-empty content.
pass_criteria: og:image + twitter:card meta present with absolute URLs.

prompt: Visit /blogs/how-i-fixed-git-reflog and grep the served HTML for in the main content. Report count.
pass_criteria: At least 1 tag includes loading="lazy" decoding="async" attributes.

prompt: Visit /blogs/ and verify the inline <style> or linked CSS file contains a rule with '@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)'.
pass_criteria: prefers-reduced-motion: reduce media block present in /assets/style.css response.

prompt: Visit / and confirm /assets/style.css contains 'a:focus-visible' and 'input:focus-visible' selectors with 'outline' declarations.
pass_criteria: Both :focus-visible rules ship, outline set, same specificity structure as :focus but listed later.

prompt: Visit / and confirm the page contains an element with class='skip' and href='#main'. Then, via JS, focus it and report its computed style: is it visible (clip-path: none)?
pass_criteria: Skip link exists once on the page; when focused, computed clip-path is none and position is fixed.

prompt: Manual Docker check required
pass_criteria: (skipped — Docker unavailable in sandbox)
notes: Docker build ×copy fixed in BG-01; O-01 follow-up still HIGH (BG-14)

prompt: grep -E 'gzip' nginx.conf
pass_criteria: nginx.conf contains 'gzip' (gzip_static or gzip on directives).

prompt: grep -E '^serve:|^prod:' Makefile
pass_criteria: Makefile serve and prod targets are syntactically valid; './builder serve' path used.

prompt: head -20 .github/workflows/ci.yml
pass_criteria: CI yaml references gcc/make; ends with no deploy step.

prompt: cat content/robots.txt ; echo --- ; python3 -m http.server ${E2E_PORT:-8123} --bind 127.0.0.1 >/dev/null 2>&1 </dev/null & disown
pass_criteria: robots.txt contains valid Disallow: directives and no inline '#' inside directives.

prompt: grep -E 'make (up|compose|down|build)' README.md | head -5
pass_criteria: README documents `make up` (not `make compose`).
